meaning: n.框格,肩带,腰带,飒饰,窗扇vt.装以窗框,系上腰带
examples: The sash, kimono, and other garments were made to fit a child.
She wore a white dress with a thin blue sash.
Wendy was married in white with a pink sash.
Six Mary's Place is an attractive Georgian townhouse where tranquil rooms have large sash windows and tiled fireplaces.
Fresh downloads bear a "New" sash and take up a bit more screen real estate.
